title: Backyard Buoys reflects on a successful 2024 season in Alaska
summary: The Backyard Buoys program celebrated another successful year in Alaska in 2024. With coordination by UIC Science, Indigenous hunters from Savoonga, Gambell, Little Diomede, Point Hope, Wainwright, Utqiaġvik, and Kaktovik deployed 26 small wave buoys from their skiffs. Of these, 19 buoys were recove...

title: Important Notice Regarding Utility Late Fee Increase
summary: As of the council meeting held on December 4, 2024, which approved the 2025 operating budget and fee schedule, please be advised that the utility late fee has increased from $5.00 to $25.00 .
